settings.openviking_description: Configure the shared embedding backend used by the single OpenViking instance for this module.
settings.embedding_api_key_help: The API key is stored as a module secret and written into the shared OpenViking configuration.

settings.embedding_warning_title: Changing the embedding service requires reindexing attention
settings.embedding_warning_description: OpenViking does not rewrite existing vectors when the embedding service changes. Existing indexed data may become incompatible or semantically inconsistent until you clear or rebuild the shared OpenViking workspace.
